dispositions.rationale: False positive. `loadConfig` IS imported in src/cli/review.js (line 5: `import { loadConfig } from '../core/config.js';`) and used at line 27. The DeepSeek (deepseek-coder:1.3b) reviewer inferred a missing import from a partial diff hunk that did not include the pre-existing import line. Verified by the Execution Lead against the full file. Qwen (technical reviewer) independently found no blocking issues.
